title: Timeline of Legends short stories
content:
{{Top|real|leg|canon=Timeline of canon short stories}} {{Citation}} {{TCWRetcon}} This a '''timeline for short stories considered canon in the Legends continuity''' that have been published in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' and other magazines as well as the internet. This list does not include documents, adventure/scenarios, or roleplaying-game (RPG) articles. This timeline is organized by chronology, and separated by [[List of publishing eras|era]], as defined by [[Lucas Licensing]].
